title: SEC v. SolarWinds Corp. (2023) — Cyber disclosure and internal controls (dismissed 2025)
forum: U.S. District Court (S.D.N.Y.) / SEC Division of Enforcement
technical_focus: Public statements, periodic reports, and incident disclosure

timeline.event: Public disclosure of SUNBURST supply chain incident affecting SolarWinds customers
SEC files civil enforcement action in S.D.N.Y.
District court decision on motion to dismiss (reported at 741 F. Supp. 3d 37)
SEC files joint stipulation dismissing action with prejudice (Litigation Release LR-26423)

evidence_artifacts: Security assessment and vulnerability tracking relative to public statements
Engineering presentations cited in enforcement narrative (privileged review)
engineering_takeaways: Internal security assessments that contradict public marketing or filings create securities exposure until processes change.
Supply chain incidents require coordinated technical, customer, and investor communications under counsel guidance.
